qualityChecks: cd plugins/e2e-test && bun install && bun run build && bun run type-check
description: Update the e2e-test plugin to use the latest SDK with new utilities (setSessionStorage, deleteJSON/patchJSON/putJSON, typed waitForSelector). Add test tools exercising these new features.

userStories.title: Update e2e-test plugin SDK dependency
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want the e2e-test plugin to use the latest SDK version with all new utilities.
acceptanceCriteria: plugins/e2e-test/package.json @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk dependency is updated to the latest version
plugins/e2e-test/package.json @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools dependency is updated to the latest version
cd plugins/e2e-test && bun run build passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && bun run type-check passes
userStories.notes: Edit plugins/e2e-test/package.json. Update versions to match what was published. Then run `cd plugins/e2e-test && bun install && bun run build`.

userStories.title: Add test tools for new SDK utilities
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want e2e-test tools that exercise setSessionStorage, putJSON/patchJSON/deleteJSON, and typed waitForSelector.
acceptanceCriteria: A new tool 'sdk_set_session_storage' is added that uses setSessionStorage and getSessionStorage
A new tool 'sdk_http_methods' is added that exercises putJSON, patchJSON, and deleteJSON against test server endpoints
The existing 'sdk_wait_for_selector' tool is updated to demonstrate the generic type parameter
All new tools are registered in the plugin index
cd plugins/e2e-test && bun run build passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && bun run type-check passes
